untranslatable_reason: Double bottom pattern formation requires candlestick/chart pattern recognition (two distinct valleys at similar price levels) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-based indicators. The source material does not provide quantitative entry rules beyond 'double bottom pattern identification' and market regime context. Pattern detection would require custom logic beyond the indicator-based rule system.
translation_notes: Attempted pragmatic proxy: Used ADX_14 > 25 to confirm strong uptrend (bull market context) and close > SMA_200 to ensure bull market regime, with 5% stop loss approximating the 5% failure rate threshold mentioned in source. Exit uses trend reversal signal (close below SMA_200). However, the core double bottom pattern detection itself is untranslatable without chart pattern recognition capability.
